moments.title: World Cup 2026 action heats up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by the USA, Canada, and Mexico, is in full swing, featuring 48 teams and running until July 19.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: World Cup fever is gripping the globe! Who are you backing to lift the trophy this year?

angles.name: Knockout Stage Talk
angles.copy: As the World Cup progresses, every match is a knockout. The drama is building!

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 underway
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships are continuing at the All England Club, running from June 29 to July 12, 2026.

angles.name: General Tennis Buzz
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are out in force! Wimbledon is delivering classic tennis drama this week.

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Are we seeing a future champion on the grass courts? All eyes on the British hopefuls at Wimbledon!

moments.title: British Grand Prix weekend
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 is happening this weekend, July 3-5, at Silverstone Circuit.

angles.name: Race Day Anticipation
angles.copy: It's race weekend at Silverstone! Who are you tipping for pole position and the win at the British Grand Prix?

angles.name: Silverstone Buzz
angles.copy: The roar of the engines is back! Silverstone is alive with F1 action this weekend. Nothing beats the British Grand Prix atmosphere.

moments.title: UK heatwave set to intensify
moments.blurb: A heatwave is gripping parts of the UK, with temperatures forecast to reach up to 40C in London and the South East next week, and a yellow heat health alert in place for London until July 11.

angles.name: Stay Cool Tips
angles.copy: The heat is on! Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool as temperatures climb across the UK this week.

angles.name: London Heat
angles.copy: London is set for scorching temperatures next week. Keep an eye on that heat health alert and look after yourselves!

moments.title: Happy 86th to Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Beatles Drummer
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on Tuesday. What's your favourite Ringo track, with or without The Beatles?

angles.name: Solo Hits
angles.copy: From 'Yellow Submarine' to 'It Don't Come Easy', Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday! What a legend.

moments.title: Arlo Guthrie turns 79
moments.blurb: American folk singer-songwriter Arlo Guthrie, known for 'Alice's Restaurant Massacree' and 'City of New Orleans', celebrates his 79th birthday on July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Folk Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to folk icon Arlo Guthrie on Friday! 'Alice's Restaurant' is still a classic.

angles.name: Woodstock Star
angles.copy: Remember his legendary Woodstock performance? Arlo Guthrie turns 79 this Friday! What a career.

moments.title: Suzanne Vega's 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: Acclaimed American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, famous for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: The voice behind 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner' celebrates her 67th birthday this Saturday! Happy Birthday, Suzanne Vega!

angles.name: MP3 Mother
angles.copy: Did you know Suzanne Vega's 'Tom's Diner' was crucial in developing the MP3 format? The 'Mother of the MP3' turns 67 this Saturday!

moments.title: The Open Championship practice begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its practice days at Royal Birkdale Golf Club from July 12, with the main tournament running July 16-19, 2026.

angles.name: Golf Major Build-up
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are heading to Royal Birkdale! Practice days for The Open Championship begin this Sunday.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: Get ready for links golf at its finest! The Open Championship is almost here, with action starting at Royal Birkdale this Sunday.
